## Item Type

- [ ] Map scene
- [ ] Style preset
- [ ] Dataset connector
- [ ] Case study
- [ ] Map plate template

## Summary

Describe what the item adds to the AI-Hydro Research Gallery and why a hydrology researcher would reuse it.

## Source And Provenance

- Source dataset or artifact:
- Data owner / provider:
- Processing method:
- CRS / resolution / spatial extent, if relevant:
- Existing AI-Hydro session, map scene, or provenance file, if available:

## License And Citation

- License:
- Required citation:
- Attribution notes:

## Artifact

Provide one of the following:

- A small file suitable for the Gallery repository.
- A stable URL to a hosted artifact.
- A draft `manifest.json`.

## Preview

Attach a screenshot, thumbnail, or short description of what the item looks like after import.

## Warnings Or Limitations

List known limitations such as large downloads, regional applicability, incomplete metadata, approximate geometry, or non-commercial license restrictions.
